sentences.arabic: أَعْلَنَتِ الحُكُومَةُ عَنْ خُطَّةٍ لِزِرَاعَةِ مِلْيُونِ شَجَرَةٍ فِي المُدُنِ الكُبْرَى.
sentences.translation: Vlada je najavila plan za sadnju milion stabala u velikim gradovima.
sentences.translationEn: The government announced a plan to plant a million trees in major cities.

sentences.arabic: تَهْدِفُ هَذِهِ المَبَادَرَةُ إِلَى حِمَايَةِ البِيْئَةِ مِنَ التَّلَوُّثِ الهَوَائِيِّ.
sentences.translation: Ova inicijativa ima za cilj zaštitu okoliša od zagađenja zraka.
sentences.translationEn: This initiative aims to protect the environment from air pollution.

sentences.arabic: سَيُشَارِكُ المُواطِنُونَ وَالمُتَطَوِّعُونَ فِي هَذَا العَمَلِ الجَمَاعِيِّ.
sentences.translation: Građani i volonteri će učestvovati u ovom zajedničkom radu.
sentences.translationEn: Citizens and volunteers will participate in this collective work.

sentences.arabic: تُسَاعِدُ الأَشْجَارُ فِي تَقْلِيلِ دَرَجَاتِ الحَرَارَةِ خِلَالَ فَصْلِ الصَّيْفِ.
sentences.translation: Drveće pomaže u smanjenju temperatura tokom ljetne sezone.
sentences.translationEn: Trees help reduce temperatures during the summer season.

sentences.arabic: يَعْتَقِدُ الخُبَرَاءُ أَنَّ هَذَا المَشْرُوعَ سَيَجْعَلُ الحَيَاةَ أَفْضَلَ لِلْجَمِيعِ.
sentences.translation: Stručnjaci vjeruju da će ovaj projekat učiniti život boljim za sve.
sentences.translationEn: Experts believe that this project will make life better for everyone.
